articles.title: Cramer Highlights Nike, Amazon, Nvidia Stock To Investors: 'Why Would You Sell It?'
articles.summary: Jim Cramer discussed three top holdings from the CNBC Investing Club portfolio: Nike, Amazon, and Nvidia. While expressing buyer's remorse for Nike due to underperformance and potential issues with its turnaround plan, he remained bullish on Amazon, citing strong performance by CEO Andy Jassy. Cramer particularly praised Nvidia, questioning why anyone would sell it, and emphasized its crucial role in the AI industry.
